title: LGTM Episode
description: Top-level episode config. Controls the human approval gate and feeds RenderConfig.

episode_id.description: Stable identifier, e.g. ep001. Used as the episode directory name.

title.description: Human-readable episode title. Used in distribution copy.

brief.description: The one-line brief that kicked off this episode.

status.description: Pipeline stage. Renderer requires 'approved' or later.

approved.description: Human approval gate. Renderer exits immediately if false.

approved_by.description: Name or identifier of the human who set approved: true.

render_config.description: All render constants. No magic numbers in renderer.py — everything comes from here.

font_headline.description: Font name for headline text. Brand value: Consolas.

font_size_headline.description: Headline font size in pixels. Omit to use renderer default.

font_size_subtitle.description: Subtitle font size in pixels. Omit to use renderer default.

lgtm_label_size.description: LGTM upper-left label font size in pixels. Omit to use renderer default.

music_volume.description: Music bed volume multiplier. Hard ceiling: 0.15. VO is the signal.

sfx_enabled.description: If false, renderer omits the SFX bed entirely (VO + optional music only). Default true when omitted.

sfx_volume.description: Multiplier applied to each SFX cue when mixing. Typical 0.35–0.55.

broll_dim.description: Opacity multiplier applied to B-roll clips. Brand value: 0.58.

ken_burns_scale.description: Ken Burns zoom scale for B-roll. Brand value: 1.07.

music.description: Music bed for this episode. Written by audio-direction agent.

track_path.description: Relative path to music file within episode directory, or absolute path.

track_url.description: Source URL if track was downloaded.

energy_arc.description: Free-text description of desired energy arc, e.g. 'low and tense, rise at 45s'.

fade_out_start.description: Seconds from start at which music begins to fade. Omit to fade at total_duration - 2s.

storyboard_path.description: Relative path to storyboard.json within the episode directory.

paths.description: Resolved paths for pipeline artifacts. Populated as pipeline runs.

tts_dir.description: Relative path to TTS WAV directory

clips_dir.description: Relative path to stock clip directory

output_dir.description: Relative path to render output directory

output_mp4.description: Relative path to final MP4, populated after render.

distribution.description: Distribution copy. Written by distribution agent after render.

thumbnail_path.description: Relative path to thumbnail image within episode directory.

platforms.description: Per-platform overrides for caption or hashtags.

examples.title: The Standup That Could Have Been an Email
examples.brief: A developer attends seven consecutive standups about canceling standups.
